faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination services in Cortlandt typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of treatment visits required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Cortlandt and Westchester County. Rat infestations require immediate attention to prevent property damage and health risks, so we prioritize emergency calls and aim to begin treatment as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for rat extermination?
faqs.answer: We employ integrated pest management techniques including strategic trap placement, rodenticide applications in secure bait stations, entry point identification and exclusion, and sanitation recommendations. All methods are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on rat extermination services in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our rat extermination services with a satisfaction guarantee. If rats return within the warranty period after treatment, we'll come back at no additional charge to re-treat your property until the problem is completely resolved.
